text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That was the day it all started.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
When my sis asked me to race her, that was my
first step toward chasing after her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That first step decided my way of life. Now I'm
about to take a new first step.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: A step toward a life where I'm always running.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Brian! Brian! Brian! Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sis.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: How was the Twinkle Series, Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It was exactly the way you said it would be.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
A place where everyone is aiming upward and
trying to reach the top.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: A place where the strong gather.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, Sis...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You're not satisfied with this either, are you?
You're still reaching for the top, right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey! Over here! Hey!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You can count me in too! Next time I'll pass everyone like ZOOM!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haha, I see. You too, then. Hey, Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You've become an inspiration to others.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
To think my tiny little sister who always chased
after me has gotten so big...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, let's all compete for the top again. And
then, when we get there—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll take it for myself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haha, still as selfish as ever I see.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So this is where you've been, President.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Heh, it seems I've been found out.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for the trouble, leaving you to take
care of things so suddenly.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No need to apologize. So, how did Narita Brian
do?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Brian... To put things simply, she's gotten much
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Simply watching her run sets my heart dancing. It
calls out to one's innate running instincts.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She must be truly exceptional for you to speak so
highly of her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Quite... Were you to watch her run, I have no
doubt you would feel the same.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I would very much like to pit myself against her.

And so, this year's final Grand Prix, the Arima
Kinen, draws to a close with everyone looking
forward to what the future holds.
